nasb.text: Thus says the Lord, “Stand by the ways and see and ask for the ancient paths, Where the good way is, and walk in it; And you will find rest for your souls. But they said, ‘We will not walk in it.’

esv.text: Thus says the Lord: “Stand by the roads, and look, and ask for the ancient paths, where the good way is; and walk in it, and find rest for your souls. But they said, ‘We will not walk in it.’

cnv.text: 耶和華這樣說： “你們要站在路上察看， 尋訪遠古的路徑， 看哪一條是美善的路，就走在其中； 這樣，你們心裡就必得安息。 他們卻說：‘我們不走在其中。’

ccb.text: 耶和华说： “你们要站在路口观望， 寻访古道， 找到正路并行在其上， 便会得到心灵的安宁。” 但你们却说：“我们拒绝这样做。”
